records.question: Name schools in Riverside which the average of average math score for SAT is grater than 400, what is the funding type of these schools?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.sname, T2.`Charter Funding Type` FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.`District Name` LIKE 'Riverside%' GROUP BY T1.sname, T2.`Charter Funding Type` HAVING CAST(SUM(T1.AvgScrMath) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.cds) > 400
records.baseline_pred: SELECT s.FundingType FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS t ON s.CDSCode = t.cds WHERE s.City = 'Riverside' AND t.AvgScrMath > 400 GROUP BY s.FundingType HAVING AVG(t.AvgScrMath) > 400
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT s.School, s.FundingType FROM schools s JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds WHERE s.City = 'Riverside' AND sat.rtype = 'S' AND sat.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.School, s.FundingType HAVING AVG(sat.AvgScrMath) > 400

records.question: For loans contracts which are still running where client are in debt, list the district of the and the state the percentage unemployment rate increment from year 1995 to 1996.
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST((T3.A13 - T3.A12) AS REAL) * 100 / T3.A12 FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT district.A2, CAST((district.A13 - district.A12) * 100.0 / district.A12 AS REAL) FROM loan JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id JOIN client ON account.district_id = client.district_id JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id WHERE loan.status = 'D'
records.alt_pred: SELECT d.A2 AS district, d.A3 AS state, ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage FROM loan l JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN disp dsp ON a.account_id = dsp.account_id JOIN client c ON dsp.client_id = c.client_id JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE l.status = 'D' GROUP BY d.district_id

records.question: What elements are in a double type bond?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '='
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom a JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '='
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom a JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '='

records.question: What is the border color of card "Ancestor's Chosen"?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT borderColor FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT borderColor FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
records.alt_pred: SELECT borderColor FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'

records.question: Lists all types of cards in German.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.subtypes, T1.supertypes FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT T1.subtypes, T1.supertypes FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT T1.subtypes, T1.supertypes FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL

records.question: Please list the Italian names of the cards in the set Coldsnap with the highest converted mana cost.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM foreign_data AS T1 INNER JOIN cards AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid INNER JOIN sets AS T3 ON T3.code = T2.setCode WHERE T3.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T1.language = 'Italian' ORDER BY T2.convertedManaCost DESC
records.baseline_pred: SELECT fd.name FROM cards AS c JOIN foreign_data AS fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid JOIN sets AS s ON c.setCode = s.code WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap' AND fd.language = 'Italian' ORDER BY c.convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT T2.name FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid INNER JOIN sets AS T3 ON T1.setCode = T3.code WHERE T3.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T2.language = 'Italian' ORDER BY T1.convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: Which of the play format has the highest number of banned status? Indicate the play format and the names of all the card meet the condition.
records.gold_sql: WITH MaxBanned AS (SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS count_banned FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT T2.format, T1.name FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid INNER JOIN MaxBanned MB ON MB.format = T2.format WHERE T2.status = 'Banned'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT l.format, c.name FROM legalities l JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE l.status = 'Banned' GROUP BY l.format ORDER BY COUNT(l.status) DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT c.name, l.format FROM cards AS c JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE l.status = 'Banned' GROUP BY l.format HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(banned_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS banned_count FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format))

records.question: Write all the comments left by users who edited the post titled 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Comment FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT comments.Text FROM comments JOIN posts ON comments.PostId = posts.Id WHERE posts.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
records.alt_pred: SELECT comments.Text FROM comments JOIN posts ON comments.PostId = posts.Id WHERE posts.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'

records.question: Which user have only one post history per post and having at least 1000 views?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.UserId FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T3.ViewCount >= 1000 GROUP BY T2.UserId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.PostHistoryTypeId) = 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId FROM postHistory ph JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id WHERE p.ViewCount >= 1000 AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ph.UserId, ph.PostId HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId FROM postHistory ph JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id WHERE p.ViewCount >= 1000 AND ph.UserId IN (SELECT UserId FROM postHistory GROUP BY UserId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT PostId) = 1)

records.question: Who was the player that got the lap time of 0:01:27 in the race No. 161? Show his introduction website.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.forename, T2.surname, T2.url FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 161 AND T1.time LIKE '1:27%'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT drivers.url FROM lapTimes JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE lapTimes.raceId = 161 AND lapTimes.time LIKE '1:27%'
records.alt_pred: SELECT drivers.url FROM lapTimes JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE lapTimes.raceId = 161 AND lapTimes.time LIKE '1:27%'

records.question: Which race was Alex Yoong in when he was in track number less than 20?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Alex' AND T3.surname = 'Yoong' AND T2.position < 20
records.baseline_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Alex' AND drivers.surname = 'Yoong' AND results.position < 20
records.alt_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Alex' AND drivers.surname = 'Yoong' AND results.position < 20

records.question: In which Formula_1 race did Lewis Hamilton rank the highest?
records.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM races WHERE raceId IN ( SELECT raceId FROM results WHERE rank = 1 AND driverId = ( SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton' ) )
records.baseline_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY results.rank ASC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY results.rank ASC LIMIT 1

records.question: What is the constructor reference name of the champion in the 2009 Singapore Grand Prix? Please give its website.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T3.constructorRef, T3.url FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN constructors AS T3 on T1.constructorId = T3.constructorId WHERE T2.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2009 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT constructors.constructorRef, constructors.url FROM results INNER JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId INNER JOIN constructors ON results.constructorId = constructors.constructorId WHERE races.year = 2009 AND races.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND results.positionOrder = 1 ORDER BY results.time DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.constructorRef, T1.url FROM constructors AS T1 INNER JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T3.year = 2009 AND T3.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND T2.position = 1

records.question: List the long name of teams with above-average build-up play passing in 2012.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t4.team_long_name FROM Team_Attributes AS t3 INNER JOIN Team AS t4 ON t3.team_api_id = t4.team_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t3.`date`, 1, 4) = '2012' AND t3.buildUpPlayPassing > ( SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.buildUpPlayPassing) AS REAL) / COUNT(t1.id) FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',t2.`date`) = '2012')
records.baseline_pred: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '2012' AND T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL AND strftime('%Y', date) = '2012')
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL AND strftime('%Y', date) = '2012') AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '2012'

records.question: Please state the finishing rate and curve score of the player who has the heaviest weight.
records.gold_sql: SELECT id, finishing, curve FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = ( SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT finishing, curve FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
records.alt_pred: SELECT finishing, curve FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 1)

records.question: Was the patient with the number 57266's uric acid within a normal range?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA > 6.5) OR (T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA > 8.0) THEN true ELSE false END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M') OR (T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F') THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_normal FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266 LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA > 8.0) OR (T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA > 6.5) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS UA_in_normal_range FROM Patient AS T1 JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266 LIMIT 1

records.question: Provide all ID, sex and birthday of patients whose urea nitrogen (UN) just within the borderline of passing?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.UN = 29
records.baseline_pred: SELECT Patient.ID, Patient.SEX, Patient.Birthday FROM Patient JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID WHERE Laboratory.UN = 29
records.alt_pred: SELECT P.ID, P.SEX, P.Birthday FROM Patient AS P JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.UN = 29

records.question: What are the patient's diagnosis for those who has lower red blood blood cell? State their ID and age.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Diagnosis, T1.ID , STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) -STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RBC < 3.5
records.baseline_pred: SELECT P.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) AS age, P.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS P JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.RBC < 3.5
records.alt_pred: SELECT P.ID, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday) AS age, P.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS P JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.RBC < 3.5

records.question: Did Maya Mclean attend the 'Women's Soccer' event?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN T3.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' THEN 'YES' END AS result FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maya' AND T1.last_name = 'Mclean'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 AS attended FROM attendance AS a JOIN member AS m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id JOIN event AS e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 AS attended FROM attendance AS a JOIN member AS m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id JOIN event AS e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'

records.question: Identify the type of expenses and their total value approved for 'October Meeting' event.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.type, SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT expense.expense_description AS type, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_value FROM expense JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND expense.approved = 'true' GROUP BY expense.expense_description
records.alt_pred: SELECT expense.expense_description, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_value FROM expense JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND expense.approved = 'true' GROUP BY expense.expense_description

records.question: Please list the product description of the products consumed in September, 2013.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Date = '201309'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT p.Description FROM yearmonth ym JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE ym.Date = '201309'
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT p.Description FROM products AS p JOIN transactions_1k AS t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID JOIN yearmonth AS y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID WHERE y.Date = '201309'

records.question: What is the amount spent by customer "38508" at the gas stations? How much had the customer spent in January 2012?
records.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.Price ) , SUM(IIF(T3.Date = '201201', T1.Price, 0)) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T1.CustomerID = '38508'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT SUM(Amount) AS TotalSpent FROM transactions_1k WHERE CustomerID = 38508 AND GasStationID IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalSpent FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 38508 AND Date = '201201'
records.alt_pred: SELECT SUM(t.Amount) AS total_spent, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS jan_2012_spending FROM transactions_1k AS t LEFT JOIN yearmonth AS ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND ym.Date = '201201' WHERE t.CustomerID = 38508
